title: neolitsea aurata var. chekiangensis
intro: Neolitsea aurata var. chekiangensis, also known as Golden Neolitsea, is a plant species within the Lauraceae family, native to eastern Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Neolitsea aurata var. chekiangensis include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting digestive health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
